# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

`git diff` shows only metadata changes under `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5` (`journal.ndjson` and `run.json`) for reviewer-session bookkeeping. No implementation files related to daemon run SIGTERM cleanup or lease handling were modified in this diff, so there are no actionable correctness/safety findings to amend at this stage.
